name: govern
description: Governance planner (workflow plane): the Manage & Comply lane. preregister freezes a comparison's spec before execution and registers it (OSF/ClinicalTrials/PROSPERO) as a confirmatory obligation; obligations tracks and resolves the project's outstanding commitments (pre-registrations, DMP/ethics/funder deliverables). Commitments live in the ledger obligations[] and are provenanced via the datalad doer.
